controls.title: COSO Principle 1: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.title: COSO Principle 13: Uses Relevant Information
controls.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

controls.title: COSO Principle 6: Specifies Suitable Objectives
controls.description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives.

controls.title: Logical and physical access controls — Restricts logical access
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events.

controls.title: Registers and authorises new users
controls.description: Prior to issuing system credentials and granting system access, the entity registers and authorises new internal and external users whose access is administered by the entity.

controls.title: Removes access to protected information assets when appropriate
controls.description: The entity authorises, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles, responsibilities, or the system design and changes thereto.

controls.title: Implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon introduction of malicious software
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorised or malicious software.

controls.title: Restricts transmission and movement of information
controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorised internal and external users and processes.

controls.title: Detects and monitors for new vulnerabilities
controls.description: To meet its objectives, the entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify (1) changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Monitors system components for anomalous behaviour
controls.description: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies.

controls.title: Authorises, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves and implements changes
controls.description: The entity authorises, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its change management commitments and system requirements.

controls.title: Identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities
controls.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

controls.title: Maintains performance objectives and availability commitments and requirements
controls.description: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity and use of system components to manage capacity demand and enables the implementation of additional capacity to help meet its availability commitments and system requirements.
